title: epipactis phyllanthes
intro: Epipactis phyllanthes, also known as the Autumn Helleborine, is a type of orchid native to Europe and Asia that is known for its unique, yellow-green flowers and delicate foliage. The medicinal properties of Epipactis phyllanthes include its ability to stimulate circulation and improve respiratory function, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, Epipactis phyllanthes is often used in infusions and decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
